result.markdown: --- title: "Week 9: ARIMA models" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Seasonal ARIMA models * Computing forecasts for ARIMA models * ARIMA vs ETS models ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 9.8-9.10 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Tutorial exercises - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). - Complete Exercises 11, 12, 13, 15 (d,e), 16 (d,e) from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html). ## Assignments * [GA3](../assignments/G3.qmd) is due on Tuesday 05 May. * [IA4](../assignments/A4.qmd) is due on Friday 15 May. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 9 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 06 May.
